premise: A retired detective receives a letter from a murder victim — postmarked the day after her death. The letter names her killer, but the name belongs to someone who died twenty years ago.

characters.name: Voss
characters.description: Retired homicide detective, mid-60s. Drinks black coffee, trusts no one, still carries her badge out of habit. Left the force after a case she couldn't solve.

characters.name: Carla Reyes
characters.description: The victim — a journalist who specialized in cold cases. Her letter is meticulous, precise, and terrified.

characters.name: Harlan Cade
characters.description: The name in the letter. Officially dead since 2006. Former city councilman with connections to organized crime.
